## Repository Hygiene

- [ ] Generated artifacts, build outputs, local hardening runs, env files, and secrets are not committed.
- [ ] Public-release-only changes are not included.
- [ ] Manual user acceptance impact is documented when relevant.

## Release Boundary

- [ ] This PR does not publish packages, remove package.json private true, make the repo public, or treat LICENSE presence as publication authorization.
